taxonomy: Cracca longifolia belongs to the family Fabaceae. This family is commonly known as the legume or pea family. Within the Fabaceae family, Cracca longifolia is classified as a genus within the subfamily Faboideae. The subfamily Faboideae is further divided into various tribes, and Cracca longifolia falls under the tribe Loteae.
